description: DaedalMap source catalog snapshot. Used as LLM context in benchmark prompts. Keep in sync with benchmark_prompt.py BENCHMARK_CATALOG.

regions.us_states: Use full state name or 2-letter abbreviation (e.g. California or CA)

sources.name: US Census Demographics
sources.notes: Must NOT be used for non-US queries

sources.name: FEMA National Risk Index
sources.notes: Risk scores per hazard type. Not event data. Must NOT be used for non-US queries.

sources.name: NOAA Storm Events Tornadoes
sources.notes: Event tracks. Must NOT be used for non-US queries.

sources.name: ABS Population
sources.notes: Australian Bureau of Statistics. Must NOT be used for non-AU queries.

sources.name: USGS and NOAA Earthquakes
sources.notes: Historical event data. Not real-time alerts.

sources.name: IBTrACS Hurricane Tracks
sources.notes: Storm track lines with wind speed and category.

sources.name: NOAA Tsunami Database
sources.notes: Distinct from earthquakes even when co-occurring.

sources.name: Smithsonian Volcanoes
sources.notes: Eruption history. Distinct from earthquakes.

sources.name: Global Wildfire Atlas
sources.notes: Perimeter and burn area data.

sources.name: Global Floods
sources.notes: Flood extent polygons. Distinct from landslides.

sources.name: NASA Landslides
sources.notes: Event locations. Distinct from floods even when co-occurring.

sources.name: Our World in Data CO2 and Climate
sources.notes: Emissions data. Distinct from un_sdg_13 (climate action indicators).

sources.name: IMF Balance of Payments
sources.notes: Trade and current account data. Distinct from fx_usd_historical (exchange rates).

sources.name: WorldPop Global Population
sources.notes: Use for non-US, non-AU population queries.

sources.name: FX Historical Exchange Rates
sources.notes: USD-base exchange rates. Not equity or commodity prices.

sources.name: SDG 1: No Poverty
sources.notes: Poverty headcount. Not Gini/inequality metrics.

sources.name: SDG 2: Zero Hunger
sources.notes: Food security and hunger indicators.

sources.name: SDG 3: Good Health and Well-Being
sources.notes: Health indicators. Not COVID case counts.

sources.name: SDG 6: Clean Water and Sanitation
sources.notes: Water access and sanitation coverage. Distinct from floods dataset.

sources.name: SDG 7: Affordable and Clean Energy
sources.notes: Energy access and renewable share indicators.

sources.name: SDG 8: Decent Work and Economic Growth
sources.notes: Employment and economic growth indicators. Not poverty (SDG 1) or BOP (imf_bop).

sources.name: SDG 13: Climate Action
sources.notes: Climate action policy indicators. Distinct from owid_co2 (raw emissions).
